descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes win Centennial Cup with 5-2 victory over Humboldt Broncos in Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-2 Saturday night in Saskatchewan to clinch the Centennial Cup, Canada's tier two junior hockey championship. Goals from Dave Tomlinson, Jason Phillips, and Paul Rutherford led the Sockeyes to victory. Goaltender Frank Romeo earned tournament MVP honors, while Phillips was named player-of-the-game. The triumph capped a successful post-season in which Richmond won 27 of 34 playoff games and claimed five titles including the Mowat Cup, Abbott Cup, and Centennial Cup.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes add Centennial Cup to their silverware collection
